betOfDay.analysis: Rockets are one of the best teams in the Western Conference and absolutely dominate at Toyota Center. The Trail Blazers are in full rebuild mode — one of the worst road teams in the league. The -6.5 is consistent across every major book, which means the sharp money agrees. No controversy here. Lay the points.

picks.reasoning: Rockets are a top-5 team in the West and dominant at home. Blazers are one of the worst road teams in the league. -6.5 locked in across all books — sharps agree. Easy lay.
Nuggets are slight home favorites with Jokic. The altitude edge at Ball Arena is real. Knicks are a good team but Denver is hard to beat at home. Tight spread, 1-unit lean.
